name: EPG Janitor
description: Scans for channels with EPG assignments but no program data. Auto-matches EPG to channels using intelligent fuzzy matching with aliases, removes EPG from hidden channels, and manages EPG assignments.
author: PiratesIRC

fields.label: Scope
fields.description: Limit which channels and EPG sources this plugin touches.

fields.label: Channel Profile Names
fields.help_text: Comma-separated profile names. Actions like 'Remove EPG from Hidden Channels' use the first profile.

fields.label: Channel Groups
fields.help_text: Only process channels in these groups. Leave empty to include all groups.

fields.label: Ignore Groups
fields.help_text: Exclude channels in these groups. Applied after 'Channel Groups' filter.

fields.label: EPG Sources to Match
fields.help_text: Comma-separated EPG source names. Leave empty to match against every configured EPG source.

fields.label: Hours to Check Ahead
fields.help_text: Window (in hours) used to validate that a matched EPG actually has program data.

fields.label: Auto-Match
fields.description: Fuzzy-match EPG entries to channels using callsign/state/city/network scoring plus Lineuparr's 4-stage pipeline.

fields.label: Auto-Match Confidence Threshold
fields.help_text: 0-100. Matches below this score are rejected. 95 is strict; lower values accept more matches at higher false-positive risk.

fields.label: Allow EPG Without Program Data
fields.help_text: When ON, auto-match accepts EPG entries even if they carry no current program schedule. Usually OFF.

fields.label: Scan & Heal
fields.description: Detect channels whose existing EPG assignment has gone stale (no program data) and replace with a working EPG.

fields.label: Heal Fallback EPG Sources
fields.help_text: Comma-separated source names that heal is allowed to pick replacements from. Empty means the channel's current EPG source only.

fields.label: Heal Confidence Threshold
fields.help_text: Minimum score for a replacement EPG to be applied during heal.

fields.label: Cleanup & Maintenance
fields.description: Actions that alter channel metadata or strip EPG assignments.

fields.label: EPG Name REGEX to Remove
fields.help_text: Python regex. Channels whose current EPG name matches get their EPG removed by 'Remove EPG Assignments matching REGEX'.

fields.label: Bad EPG Suffix
fields.help_text: Suffix appended to channel names by 'Add Bad EPG Suffix to Channels'. Leading space matters.

fields.label: Also Remove EPG When Adding Suffix
fields.help_text: When ON, 'Add Bad EPG Suffix' also strips the channel's EPG assignment in the same pass.

fields.label: Normalization Toggles
fields.description: Control which kinds of tags are stripped from channel/EPG names before matching.

fields.label: Ignore Regional Tags
fields.help_text: Strip East/West/Pacific/Central/Mountain/Atlantic from names. The regional differentiation filter still runs when a lineup explicitly carries a regional marker, regardless of this setting.

fields.label: Ignore Miscellaneous Tags
fields.help_text: Strip single-letter tags like (A), (CX), and other parenthesized noise.

fields.label: Custom Aliases
fields.description: User-provided JSON object merged on top of the built-in 200+ channel alias table. Keys are lineup channel names; values are arrays of alternate names.

fields.label: Custom Channel Aliases (JSON)
fields.help_text: JSON object. Leave empty to use built-in aliases only. Malformed JSON is ignored with a warning in the job log.

actions.label: Validate Settings
actions.description: Validate all plugin settings and database connectivity

actions.label: View Last Results
actions.description: Display summary of the last EPG scan results

actions.label: Scan for Missing Program Data
actions.description: Find channels with EPG assignments but no program data

actions.label: Preview Auto-Match (Dry Run)
actions.description: Preview intelligent EPG auto-matching with program data validation

actions.label: Scan & Heal (Dry Run)
actions.description: Find broken EPG assignments and search for working replacements (preview only)

actions.label: Export Results to CSV
actions.description: Export the last scan results to a CSV file

actions.label: Apply Auto-Match EPG Assignments
actions.description: Automatically match and assign EPG to channels using intelligent weighted scoring

confirm.message: This will assign EPG data to matched channels. Continue?

actions.label: Scan & Heal (Apply Changes)
actions.description: Automatically find and fix broken EPG assignments

confirm.message: This will replace broken EPG assignments with working ones. Continue?

actions.label: Add Bad EPG Suffix to Channels
actions.description: Add suffix to channels with missing EPG program data

confirm.message: This will rename channels that have missing EPG program data. Continue?

actions.label: Remove EPG from Hidden Channels
actions.description: Remove all EPG data from channels hidden in the selected profile

confirm.message: This will remove EPG assignments from every channel hidden in the selected profile. Continue?

actions.label: Remove EPG Assignments (Missing Program Data)
actions.description: Remove EPG assignments from channels with missing program data

confirm.message: This will permanently remove EPG assignments from channels with missing program data. Are you sure?

actions.label: Remove EPG Assignments matching REGEX
actions.description: Remove EPG from channels matching REGEX pattern within groups

confirm.message: This will permanently remove EPG assignments from channels matching the REGEX pattern. Are you sure?

actions.label: Remove ALL EPG Assignments from Groups
actions.description: Remove EPG from all channels in specified groups

confirm.message: This will permanently remove EPG from EVERY channel in the specified groups. This cannot be undone. Are you sure?

actions.label: Clear CSV Exports
actions.description: Delete all CSV export files created by this plugin

confirm.message: Delete all EPG Janitor CSV exports?
